meta.title: The Present and Future of the US-China Relationship with Ambassador John Sullivan
meta.description:
Hudson Senior Fellow Mario Mancuso sits down with Ambassador John Sullivan, former deputy secretary of state and United States ambassador to Russia, to discuss the current status and potential future of the US-China relationship and how it may impact the rest of the world.
One of America’s most distinguished public servants, Ambassador Sullivan has served under five US presidents, in leadership roles at four cabinet departments, and as deputy secretary of the Departments of State and Commerce. 

Watch part one of their conversation here: https://www.hudson.org/foreign-policy/birds-eye-view-changing-world-ambassador-john-sullivan-mario-mancuso
